title: webhook media attachment count uncapped
description: In webhook.rs handle_webhook, the loop over payload.media (lines 87-100) iterates all items sent by the caller without any upper bound. feed.rs correctly caps enclosure media at max_media_per_post() (8 items). An authenticated webhook caller (who has the key) can send an arbitrarily large media array, causing broadside to make an unbounded number of outbound HTTP fetch + image-decode + PNG-reencode + DB-write operations per request. Fix: add a .take(crate::media::max_media_per_post()) on the iterator, matching feed.rs behaviour.
close_reason: Fixed: shared_inbox SSRF guard, key_owner required, webhook media cap. Remaining (replay, unsigned accept, DNS rebinding, body buffer) accepted as known architectural limitations.
